name: Tangy Raspberry Freeze
recipeIngredient: 2 cups Fresh or frozen unsweetened Raspberries (thawed)
recipeInstructions:
1. In a medium saucepan, combine the sugar and cornstarch. Stir in the evaporated milk and light corn syrup.
2. Cook over medium heat until the mixture is bubbly. Remove from heat.
3. Whisk half of the hot milk mixture into the beaten egg.
4. Continuously whisk as you pour the egg mixture back into the remaining hot milk mixture in the saucepan. Stir over low heat until the mixture coats a spoon and is slightly thickened. Allow it to cool.
5. In a blender or food processor with a metal blade, puree the raspberries. Strain through a fine mesh to discard seeds.
6. Add the berry juice to the cooled mixture. Stir in the buttermilk.
7. Pour into an ice cream canister. Freeze according to manufacturer's directions. Makes about 1 quart.
Per Serving: 150 calories - 5 g protein - 31 g carbs - ~1 g fat - 29 mg chol - 171 mg calcium.
